seoTitle: Ferny Glen vs Ferny Grove — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ferny Glen and Ferny Grove. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Ferny Glen vs Ferny Grove: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ferny Glen and Ferny Grove.
heading: Ferny Glen vs Ferny Grove — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ferny Glen, Queensland and Ferny Grove, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ferny Grove has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Ferny Glen (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ferny Glen or Ferny Grove safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ferny Glen has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Ferny Grove scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ferny Glen scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Ferny Grove scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ferny Glen or Ferny Grove?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ferny Grove has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.78% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
